## Pull Request description

<!-- Describe the purpose of your PR and the changes you made. -->

<!-- Which issue does this PR resolve? Example: Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Course lesson or exercise update
- [ ] Documentation website update
- [ ] Python package change
- [ ] CI / developer tooling change
- [ ] Maintenance or cleanup

## How to test these changes

<!-- List the commands or manual checks used to verify the change. -->

- [ ] `poetry check`
- [ ] `makim tests.linter`
- [ ] `makim tests.unit`
- [ ] `makim package.build`
- [ ] `makim docs.build`
- [ ] Manual lesson review, if content changed

## Pull Request checklist

- [ ] I kept beginner-facing explanations clear and pedagogical, if applicable.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavior changes, if needed.
- [ ] I updated documentation or examples, if needed.
- [ ] I ran relevant local checks or explained why they were not run.
- [ ] I avoided committing generated cache/build artifacts.

## Additional information

<!-- Add screenshots, logs, rendered lesson previews, or extra context if useful. -->
